starting_commit: c8c0eca (merge of PR #123, head of claude/world-model-v2)
scope: every numeric value that could influence the DEFAULT production result of World Model V2
entry_points_traced: phase13.api recommend_action / evaluate_actions / optimize_policy / value_of_information (separate API; ensemble default)

verdicts.removed_and_quarantined: deleted from production; table buried in legacy_numeric_ablations behind the acknowledgement token
verdicts.refused_at_runtime: code path remains but the provenance gate refuses it by default and records unresolved/suppression
verdicts.replaced_qualitative: replaced by a qualitative typed representation through the existing generated architecture
verdicts.approved_provenance: retained with an approved provenance class registered in the numeric ledger
verdicts.remaining_assumption: still on a default path; explicitly listed in remaining_unsupported_assumptions

findings.concept: LLM-classified process label -> generic completion fraction
findings.replacement: mode_graph.declare_typed_processes: qualitative typed records {state, waiting_on, basis} as string quantities process_state:<pathway>; ungrounded stays 'ungrounded', never 0.5
no numeric progress quantities exist on any production plan; principals recording survives qualitatively (record_pathway_principals)
stance records condition the actor's own situated LLM cognition (qualitative_actor); stance changes happen through actor cognition at real decision triggers

findings.concept: 3-level labels and graded control -> log-effect multipliers
findings.replacement: reliability/capability/control stay qualitative facts on the stance record; control routes authority through institutional mechanisms only

findings.concept: share of stance effect on the direct hazard channel
findings.replacement: no direct stance->hazard channel exists

findings.concept: stance level -> hazard ratio (never fitted; intention_hr_pack.json does not exist so these always served)
findings.replacement: no stance->hazard channel; a future fitted pack must pass numeric_provenance.fitted_artifact_eligible AND the channel must be re-justified

findings.value: hierarchy resistance x0.25; aggregation shrink 0.25; cumulative 0.5*log sums; clamps [ln0.2, ln5]; neutral interval (1.0, 0.8, 1.25); majority floor 0.05; live-capacity 0.4+0.6*cap
findings.replacement: decision structures route WHICH mechanisms execute a mode (qualitative); they are no longer stance-combination formulas

findings.concept: the entire unfitted behavior->state->hazard coupling layer (coupling_pack.json does not exist so these always served)
findings.replacement: no coupling channel; persistence became observational (no survival coin); attrition/capacity removed

findings.symbol: CAPACITY_INIT / EFFORTFUL_ACTION_COST / EXHAUSTION / RIPENESS / BANDWAGON / hysteresis
findings.concept: normalized 0-1 capacity resource with invented drain and thresholds
findings.replacement: real resources are typed quantities with real units; exhaustion reaches actors through typed state their cognition observes

findings.value: accept +1.0, concede +0.6, counteroffer +0.35, reject -0.7, exit -1.0, launch +0.9, fire -0.2, ... (45 entries)
findings.replacement: binding prohibitions from literal instruments (basis_kind in law/treaty/contract/formal_institutional_rule) with the instrument's OWN explicit_prohibitions; ontology anchoring is purely semantic token overlap; consequences flow through the generated causal-boundary architecture

findings.concept: stance label -> aggregation weight -> actor_intentions share quantity (consumed at weight 0.2)
findings.replacement: stances are per-actor qualitative records; no aggregate share quantity exists

findings.value: posterior -> family_hazard_pack pooled rate (40 worlds: 28 sports, 4 generic, 4 meeting/deal, 3 personnel, 1 announcement) -> LEAN_BETA (ungated by PR #123)
findings.concept: forced target outcome mass for the binary residual process
findings.replacement: ONLY the evidence-updated posterior (>=1 effective as-of observation) parameterizes the residual process (registered in the ledger as derived_deterministic with the lean-anchored-prior caveat recorded); no posterior => residual mechanism recorded unresolved; unabsorbed mass classifies unresolved_mechanism with honest bounds

findings.concept: pathway_progress consumption weight on the binary residual chain
findings.replacement: no consume channels exist on the residual process

findings.value: LLM-minted relative weights, averaged across elicitation passes, z-normalized into first-passage intensity shares
findings.replacement: modes carry SUPPORT COUNTS (independent sources); no numeric priors; mode transitions occur only through modeled mechanisms or are recorded unresolved

findings.value: LLM-extracted confidence (default 0.6) used as event probability
findings.replacement: evidence-cited facts absorb deterministically at their real dates (observed_measurement provenance; extraction confidence rides as a LABEL); model-knowledge facts cannot absorb and are recorded unresolved
competing structural hypotheses stay separate qualitative structures (structural ensemble); _apply_lean_shift raises on non-neutral use

findings.concept: registry-gap broad-prior share quantity consumed via the bounded <=0.45 channel
findings.replacement: suppressed by default; records under_modeled_nonhuman_mechanism + unresolved_mechanism

findings.concept: keyword-family reference-class rate realizing an aggregate outcome
findings.replacement: family rates fail fitted_artifact_eligible (no held-out metrics/transport check); suppressed + unresolved; posterior rung remains
only observed/derived segment distributions aggregate; assumed priors are skipped; no 0.5 default; empty => unresolved record
diffusion refuses without a fitted, eligibility-passing transmissibility artifact; records unresolved

findings.concept: probability a provisional end-state holds its window
findings.replacement: OBSERVATIONAL persistence: confirms iff the provisional state still holds when the window completes in the simulated world; collapses only via a modeled breaking mechanism (break_provisional_state)

findings.concept: equal-weight structural averaging presented as the headline probability
findings.replacement: materially disagreeing models serve per-model conditionals + robust ranges (partially_resolved, no headline); the mixture survives only as equal_weight_mixture_diagnostic; agreeing models still serve the shared conclusion

findings.symbol: LEAN_BETA prior anchoring the evidence posterior; phase3b TRANSPORT_RETAINED discounts; MAX_EFFECTIVE_N=40
findings.note: the evidence-updated posterior (>=1 effective observation) remains production-legal per the task's own operational line; its broad unfitted prior is explicitly recorded as a remaining assumption in the ledger applicability note
scheduling-layer timing bands for generated channels; affect WHEN events are checked; terminal timing claims are labeled with timing_support_classification and simulated_scenario_frequency
attention-cadence multipliers for generated latent states; behavior-timing only

findings.symbol: PersistentStatePosterior mean 0.5 sd 0.29; terminal_sensitivity per variable (0.4-0.8); memory salience bands

findings.was_default: only when network layers declared; downstream diffusion now refuses
legacy persona blend path; strict default routes qualitative
legacy layer; bounded_cognition is the PR #123 default

findings.note: memory retrieval-failure bands in the mechanically bounded cognition layer

findings.symbol: WIDEN_BY_RISK, evidence-quality tiers, axis weights, usable threshold 0.45
findings.note: family-matching heuristics for the cited-coefficient registry (Tier 2-4 packs carry real citations; the MATCHING weights are heuristic)
rates require a defensible kind + named provenance; unprovenanced rates coerce to unresolved and are never sampled
literal institutional rule numbers (votes needed, quorum) — institutional_rule provenance
the criterion's own literal persistence window (institutional_rule), registered in the plan ledger

findings.symbol: particle floors, event budgets, WM_SAFETY_MAX, retry caps
findings.note: compute_safety class: visible truncation only; can_alter_terminal=false in the ledger
analysis/display class; never alter world evolution

search_patterns_used: mode weights and shares entering intensity
